title: Research Associate I
description: Abbott Laboratories is seeking a Research Associate I to support product development and clinical research programs. Work hybrid at our Minneapolis facility, contributing to the innovation of life-saving medical devices. Help advance patient outcomes through cutting-edge research.
responsibilities: Support clinical research studies and assist in data collection and analysis
Prepare reports and presentations summarizing research findings
Conduct literature reviews and summarize relevant scientific evidence
Maintain research databases and ensure data integrity and quality
Assist with regulatory documentation and compliance activities
Collaborate with research team members and external partners

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Life Sciences, Biomedical Engineering, or related field
skills: Understanding of research methodologies and study design
Attention to detail and regulatory compliance awareness
Ability to work collaboratively in research teams

benefits: Hybrid work arrangement with on-site collaboration
Health, dental, vision, and wellness coverage
